description_en: A monument (historic site), old castle ruins. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-04-01. It is held in a private collection.

name_romaji: Tōkō Jōshū Gonda-jū Masashige yashiki ato
name_en: Residence Ruins of the Swordsmith Masashige of Gonda, Joshu
description_en: A monument (historic site), the residence ruins of a swordsmith. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-04-01. It is held in a private collection.

name_en: Ruins of the Shogunate Timber Shipment Office
description_en: A monument (historic site), the ruins of a shogunate office for timber shipment. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-04-01. It is held in a private collection.

name_romaji: (Den) Gonda Kurige Ohoro Myōjin, (den) Gonda Kurige Iwashita gankutsu Kannon
name_en: Reputed Gonda Chestnut Horse Ohoro Myojin and Reputed Gonda Chestnut Horse Iwashita Cave Kannon
description_en: A monument (historic site) associated with a local legend of the Gonda chestnut horse. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 2005-12-22. It is located at Tozenji temple in Gonda, Kurabuchi-machi.

description_en: A monument (historic site), a mound and associated cherry tree. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1973-07-31. It is held privately in Yahara, Misato-machi.

description_en: A monument (historic site), a temporary imperial lodging (anzaisho). It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1991-12-07. It is held by Takasaki City in Shinmachi.
